steps.name: score-helper
steps.summary: observability/langfuse_setup.py에 create_score(trace_id,name,value) 추가 — no-op 가드 + v3(get_client().create_score)/v2(Langfuse().score) 지연 import + 예외 삼킴, no-op 회귀 테스트 1개 추가

steps.name: eval-dataset
steps.summary: eval 레이어 신설 — eval/golden/questions.jsonl(docs 근거 생성축 질문 16개, question 필드만), eval/dataset.py load_questions(디렉토리→questions.jsonl, 빈 줄 skip, 파싱 실패는 예외), tests/test_eval_dataset.py 4개(로더 3 + golden 회귀 1)

steps.name: ragas-runner
steps.summary: eval/ragas_run.py 신설 — build_samples(search()+generate_answer() 조합, @observe eval_query span·get_trace_id 수집, generator/searcher 주입 가능), score_samples(ragas 0.4.3 evaluate로 Faithfulness·ResponseRelevancy, judge=ChatAnthropic(judge_model), BGE-M3→langchain Embeddings 어댑터, ragas·langchain_anthropic·datasets 지연 import), main(--dataset→trace push+eval/results/latest.json+요약); config judge_model=claude-sonnet-5, requirements Eval 섹션(langchain-community<0.4 핀), .gitignore eval/results/, tests/test_ragas_run.py 2개(지연 import + fake build_samples)
